subject: [PATCH] btrfs: fix potential segfault in balance_remap_chunks()

reviews.author: Mark Harmstone
reviews.summary: Reviewer accepted the idea of considering unused BGs as 'maybe unused' and suggested adding a bg variable, which will be addressed in a new patch.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: Patch author's suggestion to consider unused BGs as 'maybe unused' is accepted, and a new patch will be sent to add a bg variable.
